tag_notes: Broad bay view with a low wooded shoreline and the hazy Manhattan skyline in the distance; appears to be Broad Channel / Jamaica Bay, Queens.
Faint Manhattan skyline on the horizon beyond a marshy shoreline and glassy bay at dusk; appears to be Broad Channel / Jamaica Bay, Queens.
Hazy Lower Manhattan skyline across a wide calm bay at golden hour, airplane overhead; appears to be Broad Channel / Jamaica Bay, Queens.
Calm bay with a marshy island and faint dual skylines (Lower Manhattan and Midtown) on the hazy horizon; appears to be Broad Channel / Jamaica Bay, Queens.
Calm bay at golden hour with a lone waterfowl, marshy spit and faint Manhattan skyline in the distance; appears to be Broad Channel / Jamaica Bay, Queens.
Dual distant skylines (Lower Manhattan and Midtown) across the bay over a low tree-covered spit at golden hour; appears to be Broad Channel / Jamaica Bay, Queens.
Distant Manhattan skyline (Freedom Tower left, Midtown right) across calm Jamaica Bay water with a lone waterfowl; appears to be Broad Channel, Queens.
Faint distant skyline on the horizon across still bay water at sunrise; appears to be Broad Channel, Queens (Jamaica Bay).
Hazy Manhattan skyline over Jamaica Bay at dawn with a low marshy spit and a swimming bird; appears to be Broad Channel, Queens.
Pale skyline silhouette across a low marsh island and calm water, dawn pastel light; appears to be Broad Channel, Queens (Jamaica Bay).
Muted purple-pink dawn with hazy Midtown Manhattan skyline over a marsh spit and still bay; appears to be Broad Channel, Queens (Jamaica Bay).
Corner block at Sycamore St: a vacant vinyl-sided two-story storefront-with-apartment beside low commercial buildings (R Wireless LLC, home care agency), boarded windows at dusk.
Three-story orange-brick house (number 512) with a green flared hipped/gambrel roof, dormers, and a green-roofed entry porch over a rusticated stone base; a gray clapboard house adjoins at left.
Ornate Victorian rowhouse entry at number 49 with polychrome brick and stone, a green porch with carved brackets and turned posts, and paired wooden doors.
Portrait of a smiling family of three (two adults holding a toddler) in a green garden setting, with a white industrial building and apartments behind.
Portrait of the same family of three smiling in a green garden, with a white industrial building, a street, and apartments in the background.
Portrait of the same family of three, the toddler laughing, in a green garden with a white industrial building behind.
Tan and red brick loft/industrial facades with a vertical 'SHAFTWAY' painted marking and steel canopy; a glassed-in rooftop addition sits behind a corrugated gray building.
A pigeon perched on a rooftop parapet with the Midtown Manhattan skyline (Hudson Yards) rising above rowhouse rooftops.

Black-and-white view of the ornate Victorian brick commercial building on Broad St housing Nohble and Best Caps, with an iron twin-globe lamppost, white smokestack behind and a pedestrian in foreground.
Carved limestone entry of the Newark Public School of Fine and Industrial Arts framed by trees, with arched stained-glass transom and fluted pilasters, as a man walks the sidewalk.
Same green-tile apartment, car entering garage
Same 123 Avenue U brick block with Pueblita Grocery and J&M storefronts, showing the carved cartouche, arched windows, and fire escape; a pedestrian walks at left.
Brick housing-project buildings around a courtyard with the Midtown Manhattan skyline behind, including the Empire State Building, Chrysler Building, and Billionaires' Row supertalls at golden hour.
Brick housing-project buildings with the Midtown Manhattan skyline behind, including the Empire State Building, Chrysler Building, and the supertall towers of Billionaires' Row in hazy light.
Brick mid-rise housing-project buildings with the Midtown Manhattan skyline behind, featuring the Empire State Building, Chrysler Building, and Billionaires' Row supertalls in warm hazy sunset light.
Wide view of brick housing-project towers fronting the Midtown Manhattan skyline with the Empire State Building, Chrysler Building, and the supertall pencil towers of Billionaires' Row in hazy light.
Near-duplicate of IMG_1775: row of gabled brick single-family homes with slate roofs behind a picket fence, dark SUV at the curb; Forest Hills/Rego Park, Queens.
